## 📝 Pull Request Description

### What does this PR do?
A clear and concise description of what you've added, changed, or fixed.

### Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (fixes a broken feature without changing other behaviour)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (adds a new Azure service page or major feature)
- [ ] 📘 Documentation (README, comments, learning path)
- [ ] 🎨 Style / UI improvement (CSS, layout, responsiveness)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (code improvement without changing functionality)
- [ ] 🌍 Localisation (new language support)

### Checklist
- [ ] I tested this in Chrome (or Chromium-based browser)
- [ ] I tested on a mobile screen size (375px wide or smaller)
- [ ] No console errors in the browser developer tools
- [ ] I followed the coding standards in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] I updated the README.md "Services Covered" table (if I added a new page)
- [ ] I added the new service to the search index in `js/search.js` (if applicable)
- [ ] Commit messages follow the format: `type: short description`

### Screenshots (if UI changes)
Before | After
--- | ---
(screenshot) | (screenshot)

### Related Issues
Closes #(issue number)

---
*Thank you for contributing to the Azure Learning Simulator by Adewale Adeagbo!*
